summary: Phase 1 (Stop-Loss/Take-Profit Orders + Public Leaderboard) testing completed successfully. Backend: 32/32 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified working correctly including Leaderboard page with filters and Trade modal with SL/TP functionality.
passed_tests: GET /api/orders/active returns active orders for user
GET /api/leaderboard free user limited to top 10
GET /api/leaderboard pro user has full access
GET /api/leaderboard elite user has full access
Integration: Complete order creation flow with SL and TP
Frontend: Leaderboard page loads with title and trophy icon
Frontend: Top Performers cards (Top P&L, Top Win Rate, Top ROI) display
Frontend: Leaderboard table has correct columns (Rank, Trader, P&L, Win Rate, ROI, Trades, Actions)
Frontend: Trade modal opens with Execute button
Frontend: Risk Management section visible in trade modal
Frontend: Stop-Loss price input (data-testid=sl-price-input) shows default -5%
Frontend: Take-Profit price input (data-testid=tp-price-input) shows default +10%
Frontend: SL/TP percentage calculations displayed correctly
critical_code_review_comments: OrderManagerService correctly implements SL/TP order creation with validation
Order monitoring runs as background task checking prices every 5 seconds
LeaderboardService correctly calculates trader stats with period filtering
Free users limited to top 10 on leaderboard, Pro/Elite get full access
Frontend trade modal correctly integrates SL/TP with API calls
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_orders_leaderboard.py - Created comprehensive SL/TP and Leaderboard tests (32 tests)
seed_data_creation: Test orders created with TEST_SLTP_ prefix for cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 features fully implemented and tested. Stop-Loss/Take-Profit orders work via POST /api/orders/sl-tp with user_id query param. Orders are stored in MongoDB 'orders' collection. Leaderboard is empty initially because no traders have public stats yet - this is expected behavior. The order monitoring runs as a background task checking prices every 5 seconds. Frontend has Leaderboard page at /leaderboard with Daily/Weekly/Monthly/All-time tabs and P&L/Win Rate/ROI sorting. Trade modal has Risk Management section with SL/TP toggles that show price inputs when enabled.

features_verified.frontend_leaderboard_page: Leaderboard page with filters and table
features_verified.frontend_trade_modal_sltp: Trade modal with Stop-Loss and Take-Profit toggles and inputs
